{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20855_1
|class_id=20855
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20855_2
|fame=95
|art=95
|fth=95
|civ=95
|tech=100
|ss1=Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail HP +50<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +5<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail DEF +5<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail RUSH +5<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss2=Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail HP +100<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +10<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail DEF +10<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail RUSH +10<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss3=Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail HP +150<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail DEF +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss4=Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail HP +150<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail DEF +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss7=Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail HP +150<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail DEF +15<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
